content.question: What proportion of Hungarian rural school closures since 2013 have coincided with or preceded measurable out-migration from affected villages, versus villages that retained population despite closure?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a retrospective cohort study linking administrative records of school closures (2013–2023) to Hungarian Central Statistical Office population data at settlement level, stratified by closure timing, village size, and regional economic conditions, to estimate closure's association with subsequent depopulation independent of pre-closure trends
